nasb.text: Likewise, every grain offering that is baked in the oven and everything prepared in a pan or on a griddle shall belong to the priest who presents it.

esv.text: And every grain offering baked in the oven and all that is prepared on a pan or a griddle shall belong to the priest who offers it.

cnv.text: 一切在爐裡烤的，或在淺鍋裡或在煎盤上做的素祭，都要歸給那獻祭的祭司。

ccb.text: 至于素祭，不论是用炉烤的，还是用平底锅或煎锅做的，都要归主持祭礼的祭司。
